xml_detection_order.item: single XML file in KOV folder if unambiguous
single XML file in KOV/rt folder if unambiguous

policy.auto_ingest_only_when: auto_ingest=true and local XML file is found

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social benefits and social services in Järva vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Jõelähtme vallas
entry.notes: General regulation for social services and benefits in Jõelähtme vald.

entry.actTitle: Jõgeva valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation covering social services and benefits for Jõgeva residents

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Jõhvi vallas
entry.notes: General regulation for social benefits and services in Jõhvi vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social welfare assistance in Kadrina vald.

entry.actTitle: Kambja valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Regulation effective 1 Jan 2025 governing application and receipt of social services and support in Kambja vald

entry.actTitle: Kanepi valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Regulates the granting of social welfare assistance (services and supports) to residents of Kanepi using municipal and state funds

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Close match; regulation appears fragmented, and this is the best general match found.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise tingimused ja kord
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Kehtna vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Keila linnas
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Keila city.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise tingimused ja kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social welfare assistance in Kihnu vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Kiili vallas
entry.notes: General regulation covering social services, benefits and financing in Kiili vald.

entry.actTitle: Kohila valla poolt korraldatavate sotsiaalteenuste osutamise kord
entry.notes: Verified RT current text; services regulation; valid as KOV RT/legal layer candidate.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Kohtla-Järve city.

entry.actTitle: Kose valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Sets conditions and procedures for social welfare assistance and services in Kose, effective from 1 July 2025

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Kuusalu vallas
entry.notes: General regulation for social services and benefits in Kuusalu vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Lääne‑Harju vallas
entry.notes: Regulation that governs social services and social support in Lääne‑Harju, describing application and determination processes

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalteenuste osutamise tingimused ja kord
entry.notes: Verified RT current text; Lääne-Nigula Vallavolikogu; services regulation.

entry.actTitle: Lääneranna valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social services and benefits in Lääneranna vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalteenuste osutamise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social services in Loksa city.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekande abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Best close match; title differs slightly but the act covers social services and social benefits.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social services and social benefits in Luunja vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalteenuste osutamise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social services in Maardu city.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Märjamaa vallas
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Märjamaa governing social services and benefits

entry.actTitle: Muhu valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Muhu vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalteenuste osutamise kord Mulgi vallas
entry.notes: Verified RT current text; services regulation.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Mustvee vallas
entry.notes: General regulation for social services and social benefits in Mustvee vald.
General social welfare regulation not found.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaaltoetuste maksmise ja sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Narva-Jõesuu linnas
entry.notes: Verified RT current text; combined social benefits and social welfare assistance regulation.

entry.actTitle: Nõo valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Regulation detailing the description, funding and application procedures for social services and benefits provided by Nõo vald

entry.actTitle: Otepää valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Act governing the conditions and procedures for providing social support and services in Otepää vald

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social welfare assistance in Paide city.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalteenuste osutamise kord
entry.notes: Verified RT current text; Pärnu Linnavolikogu; services regulation.

entry.actTitle: Peipsiääre valla sotsiaalteenuste osutamise kord
entry.notes: Lists social services provided by Peipsiääre, including home service, general care, support person and others, and sets their conditions

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Põhja-Pärnumaa vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi osutamise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social welfare assistance in Põhja-Sakala vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Põltsamaa vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaaltoetuste määramise ja maksmise kord
entry.notes: Verified RT current text; benefits regulation. Services may need separate act if service-level legal coverage is required.

entry.actTitle: Raasiku valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi osutamise kord
entry.notes: Current general regulation uses a slightly different title than the standard wording.

entry.actTitle: Rae valla sotsiaalteenuste osutamise kord
entry.notes: Current act (as of 3 Sept 2024) establishing conditions and procedures for providing social services in Rae and listing specific services

entry.actTitle: Rakvere linna sotsiaalteenused
entry.notes: Act effective 29 Mar 2025 regulating the application, determination and financing of social services provided by Rakvere city

entry.actTitle: Rakvere valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise tingimused ja kord
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Rakvere vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Räpina vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Rapla vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandeabi andmise kord Rõuge vallas
entry.notes: Close match; title differs slightly from the standard wording.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise tingimused ja kord Ruhnu vallas
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Ruhnu vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalteenuste osutamise tingimused ja kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social welfare services in Saarde vald.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Saaremaa vallas
entry.notes: Regulation outlining the provision of social welfare assistance, including services and benefits, for residents of Saaremaa

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social services and benefits in Saku vald.

entry.actTitle: Saue valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Latest Saue regulation (effective 3 May 2025) covering social welfare assistance and services; replaces earlier versions

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social services and social benefits in Setomaa vald.

entry.actTitle: Sillamäe linna sotsiaalteenuste osutamise kord
entry.notes: Sets the procedure for providing social services to Sillamäe residents and those temporarily in the city

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Tallinn.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Tapa vallas
entry.notes: General regulation for Tapa specifying how social support and services are applied for, determined and financed

entry.actTitle: Tartu linna sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social welfare assistance in Tartu city.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Tartu vallas
entry.notes: General regulation describing social services and benefits in Tartu vald and procedures for application

entry.actTitle: Tori valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise tingimused ja kord
entry.notes: Sets the conditions and procedures for social support and services in Tori vald, including principles and eligibility

entry.actTitle: Tõrva valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi osutamise tingimused ja kord
entry.notes: Current act (effective 1 Mar 2024) that sets conditions and procedures for determining social benefits and organizing social services in Tõrva vald

entry.actTitle: Türi valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Regulation sets out the social welfare tasks in Türi; establishes competence, types of assistance and paid social servicesview-source:

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Latest accessible version found (2022) setting conditions for social services and benefits; newer redactions may exist but were inaccessible

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General social welfare regulation for Valga vald.

entry.actTitle: Viimsi valla sotsiaalteenuste osutamise tingimused ja kord
entry.notes: Act sets the conditions and procedures for applying, determining and financing social services in Viimsi

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Verified RT current text; Viljandi Linnavolikogu; social welfare assistance regulation. Note: this is Viljandi linn, not Viljandi vald.
General social welfare regulation not found; available acts appear fragmented or pertain to specific services.

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: General regulation for social welfare assistance in Vinni vald.

entry.actTitle: Viru‑Nigula valla sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise tingimused ja kord
entry.notes: Sets the conditions and procedures for providing social welfare assistance in Viru‑Nigula, including rules for applying for and determining benefits and services

entry.actTitle: Sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord Vormsi vallas
entry.notes: General regulation for social services and social benefits in Vormsi vald.

entry.actTitle: Võru linna sotsiaalhoolekandelise abi andmise kord
entry.notes: Regulation governing social services and support in Võru city; defines application procedures and financing

entry.actTitle: Võru valla sotsiaalteenuste osutamise kord
entry.notes: General act describing the social services offered by Võru rural municipality and the conditions and procedures for requesting them
